blast_radius: Python trainer + ONNX contract v2 + JVM inference bridge; v1 baseline path preserved
council: intake 42 findings / plan 41 findings — all critical+major folded

review_focus.item: GAE over ordered trajectories: do NOT drop no-action steps; reward terminal-only; batch-level adv norm
review_focus.why: per-trajectory norm or dropped steps silently corrupt the credit signal

review_focus.item: Spatial encoder = masked tile-set pool, no positional feature (grid-CNN rejected)
review_focus.why: 2D coords not recoverable without forbidden new emitted data

review_focus.item: Contract v1→2 multi-tensor lockstep (contract.py ↔ SampleSchema) + parity atol=1e-4
review_focus.why: cross-language drift is the top correctness risk over the new contract

review_focus.item: Acceptance = experiment executed + reported, not a p<0.05 ship gate
review_focus.why: an ML outcome must not block shipping; report honestly within budget

top_decisions.decision: Spatial = masked tile-set pool, no positional feature
A2C+GAE over ordered trajectories, reward terminal-only, batch-level adv norm
top_decisions.rejected: REINFORCE reward-broadcast (breaks GAE) / per-trajectory norm (kills signal)

top_decisions.decision: Plain A2C+GAE single-epoch default for the curves
Value head training-only; play ONNX policy-only

risks.text: Full-run wall-clock blows up (Medium games long)
risks.mitigation: hard budget + per-round checkpoint/resume; smoke-measure first; STOP at ceiling, report honestly
extended parity test atol=1e-4 (anti-drift gate); u8→f32 both sides

risks.text: Token-pool spatial may not beat blind on Medium (no 2D locality)
risks.mitigation: honest AC3 reporting permitted; rich still sees entities/terrain blind never gets

risks.text: GAE/value instability or NaN on empty entity sets
risks.mitigation: masked-pool NaN guard, batch adv-norm, divergence abort, grad-norm logging

rollback: v1-reinforce variant + contract v1 path untouched; revert worktree branch to restore v1-only
verification: pytest python/tests/test_gae.py — GAE math + value head + value-dropped-at-export
pytest python/tests/test_parity.py — JVM↔Python multi-tensor logits within atol=1e-4
pytest python/tests/test_determinism.py — same seed → byte-identical shards
gradle test OnnxPolicyLegalityTest — choice always legal or -1
grep -n reward python/unciv_train/{train,dataset}.py — no intermediate reward term
curve.csv x3 variants + overlaid plot — attributable curves; last-K stddev + Medium two-proportion p
open_questions: compute budget magnitude (D13) — concrete numbers proposed; user may dial at this gate
